settings.title: Sourcing
settings.body: One call triggers verified sourcing. Craft, spec, and delivery window route directly to matched suppliers. No RFQ ping-pong.

settings.title: Verification
settings.body: Every SKU passes spec compliance, provenance check, and quality gate before it enters your dispatch queue.

settings.title: Dispatch
settings.body: Route-optimized dispatch from nearest hub. Real-time SKU tracking. Consolidated shipping to cut freight cost.

settings.title: Delivery
settings.body: Site-ready delivery with QR-tagged manifest. Every crate arrives labeled, sorted, and audit-ready.
